---
title: "EventManager.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/EventManager.ts"
loc: 37
complexity: 7
logic_score: 6.20
style_score: 4.08
intel_score: 4.16
overall_score: 4.81
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [WebSocket](file://ws)

### Exports
- `Map`
- `EventManager`
- `clients`
- `clients`
- `message`
